note: The official PDFs are headed 2026-27 requirements for the 2025-26 intake. This supplement records only explicit coded rows for the first Major of each named Programme. Generic subject-and-level rows are not fabricated as course codes: MAEC's ECON 4000-level-or-above elective requirement is 8 credits, and SGFN's FINA 3000-/4000-level elective requirement is 3 credits. University requirements remain outside this Programme-local supplement, so these rows must not be treated as a graduation-completion decision.
